action.reasoning: Observation: After 54 epochs, val exprate=0.0071, loss=2.14. The model is barely learning. Analysis: The DenseNet-121 with stride 32 gives only 4x16=64 spatial positions from 128x512 input - too few. Also the model may be too small. The loss is still very high. Decision: Redesign with (1) better encoder with less downsampling - use DenseNet features but with smaller stride, (2) larger model (d_model=512, 6 decoder layers), (3) better LR with warmup, (4) larger batch size. Also fix the image preprocessing to use a more appropriate size.
